title: Forge Usage Log Entry
description: Schema for individual entries in library/usage-log.jsonl. Each line in the file is one JSON object matching this schema.

item.description: Relative path from library/ to the item, without file extension. Example: agents/software/product-manager

type.description: What kind of library item was used

context.description: Which skill or process triggered this event. Example: mission-planner, agent-creator, librarian, manual
